articles.title: Three Indian sailors killed in US strike on oil tanker - BBC
articles.description: The US military had attacked the Palau-flagged tanker on Wednesday after accusing it of not complying with directions.
articles.content: India's Ministry of Ports, Shipping and Waterways Additional Secretary Mukesh Mangal said the three seamen on board the Settebello who died were Aditya Sharma, a cadet, Shivanand Chaurashiya, a fitte… [+39 chars]
